title: Resources ≠ Success
reflection: Drawing on her time teaching in Ukraine, Miss Michalak, a science teacher at Arkport, explains why having more resources isn't always the key to student engagement and success.

title: From Low Scores to Leadership
reflection: Mr. Kramer, Arkport's technology and agriculture teacher, discusses how real-world connections foster engagement, transforming traditionally low-performing students into confident leaders.

title: Already Scientists
reflection: Miss Michalak uses her experiences in hunting and maple farming to make science feel real, leading students to make their own connections and recognize the science already present in their own work and everyday lives.

title: Shop Tour
reflection: Mr. Kramer shows us the tools and projects from the shop.

title: Life Beyond the Classroom
reflection: Miss Michalak discusses her difficult decision to leave Arkport, diving into the often overlooked importance of identity in the lives of teachers.
